bullets: • In 2026, one must be coding Cases Incident 2026.
• Coding is not dead, but requires active engagement in organizations.
• India is projected to become a leading open source community.
• Self-hosted full-stack applications and managing infrastructure are discussed.
• Understanding and creating your own digital style is emphasized.
